overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban waterfront district at dusk. The player moves from a covered neon-lit plaza through an open palm-lined promenade overlooking the water, then along the waterfront with views of the Night City skyline and flying vehicles.

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered concrete plaza toward the waterfront exit, passing under red neon strips

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban plaza with brutalist concrete architecture and red neon ceiling lights. The camera approaches a yellow striped crosswalk with other pedestrians ahead, moving toward a distant archway exit. A green neon 'California Ave' sign is visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor from covered plaza to open waterfront

emerging from artificial neon light into natural dusk light with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway exit toward the open waterfront area with palm trees visible ahead

illuminated vertical digital billboard with animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered plaza through a wide archway into an open waterfront area. The lighting shifts from red neon to natural dusk as palm trees and the ocean become visible ahead. The wet tiled pavement reflects the ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and digital advertising

futuristic skyscrapers visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and modern street lamps. Digital advertising kiosks illuminate the path while benches face the calm water. The distant Night City skyline is visible across the bay under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront viewing area with panoramic city skyline

events.description: turning left to view the Night City skyline and flying traffic
futuristic flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance above the water
entering covered walkway under the building overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning to view the illuminated city skyline and flying vehicles, then proceeding along the waterfront path

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car hovering over the water near the skyline

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
red concrete overpass with integrated lighting and glass railings

segments.scene_description: Turning to reveal the spectacular Night City skyline with towering illuminated skyscrapers across the water. A flying vehicle passes overhead. The camera then enters a covered walkway beneath a red concrete overpass structure, transitioning from open sky to sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with red neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront walkway illuminated by red neon underglow from the concrete overpass above. The wet pavement reflects the red and green neon lights from nearby advertising billboards. Palm trees continue along the path while the city skyline remains visible in the background through gaps in the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban plaza into an expansive waterfront promenade before returning to a sheltered industrial walkway. It begins beneath a brutalist concrete ceiling bathed in red neon, moving past a green California Ave sign and across a yellow striped crosswalk toward a distant archway. As the camera exits the plaza, the red artificial light gives way to the natural hues of dusk, opening up to a wet tiled promenade lined with palm trees and digital kiosks overlooking a calm bay. The scene then expands to reveal the towering, illuminated skyscrapers of the Night City skyline and a flying vehicle passing overhead before the camera turns toward a red concrete overpass. Finally, the environment shifts back into a sheltered space, where the path is illuminated by red neon underglow and reflections of green billboards on the damp pavement.
